hero.description: Frontend Developer specialized in React and 3D experiences

about.title: About Me
about.description: Frontend Developer with experience in modern web applications using React, Next.js, and scalable architectures. I have worked on real-time systems for drone management and complex dashboards.

description: Build and customized e-commerce platforms using WordPress and WooCommerce, including product managemenr, payment integration and responsive UI design. Managed deployment and hosting using Hostinger.

Developed a personal portfolio and content management system using React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS and Three.js, enabling dynamic project updates and modular content handling. Deployed using GitHub Pages.
Developed a React-based web application using reusable components and design patterns with Storybook, including monitoring of routes, flight status, and scheduled mission through multiple views.
Designed and implemented institutional websites using React and WordPress, featuring videos and animations.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in agile environments, contributing to the planning, design, and implementation of new interfaces and functionalities.
Developed and implemented responsive web and mobile applications using Angular and flutter, integrating backend functionality with Firebase (Realtime Database and Firestore).
Managed application deployment and hosting on platforms such as GitHub Pages, Firebase Hosting and VPS.

items.name: Drone Dashboard
items.description: Developed the frontend architecture of a web application for managing autonomous drone operations. Implemented real-time data visualization for drone telemetry, mission tracking, and operational status through interactive views, including maps, tables, calendars and PDF reports

items.name: 3D Portfolio Experience
items.description: Designed and developed my professional portfolio using React and Tailwind CSS, incorporating animations and 3D visualizations with Three.js and React Three Fiber.

items.name: E-commerce Platform
items.description: Full web application with shopping cart, authentication, and product management.
